articleFragmentPath.fieldDescription: Path to the Content Fragment to display.
articleFragmentPath.name: ./articleFragmentPath

contentPath.fieldDescription: This field will map the tags
contentPath.name: ./mappedPage

tags.fieldDescription: Tags configured here will hide the tags configured in Page Properties.
tags.name: ./tags

id.fieldDescription: HTML ID attribute to apply to the component.
id.name: ./id

fragmentVariationPath.name: ./fragmentVariationPath
fragmentVariationPath.fieldDescription: Choose the experience fragment variation to display.
